description.p: TriNetra is India's premium social super-app that combines everything you need: a real-time social feed with Universal Media Download, WhatsApp 2.0 level end-to-end encrypted messenger with ZegoCloud, a 5-in-1 Payment Network (PayU, Braintree, PayPal, Paddle, Adyen), Auto-Escalation Complaint System, and a Master 6-in-1 AI Brain (Meta, ChatGPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, Manus, Emergent) — 100% powered by AWS.
Built with Flutter for Android, iOS, Web, Windows, macOS, and Linux.

ul.li: Social Feed with Multilanguage AI-powered translation (English ↔ Hindi)
WhatsApp 2.0 Messenger — AWS Auto-Sync with Video, Audio, and PDF Calling
The Economy — PayU, PayPal, Braintree, Paddle, and Adyen Integrations
Marketplace & 4-Tier Boost Economy (Free 70/30, Paid 25/75, 100% User, Auto-Boost)
Auto-Escalation System — Solves issues automatically from Local Authority up to Supreme Court
6-in-1 Master AI — Chatbot, Agentic, and Super Agentic (100% Human-Brain Level) Modes
OS Creation Tier — Build full operating systems with 5000 Premium AI Credits

description.p: TriNetra भारत का प्रीमियम सोशल सुपर-ऐप है जो सोशल फीड, मैसेंजर, 5 असली पेमेंट गेटवे और 6-इन-1 मास्टर AI को एक जगह लाता है। बिना किसी Firebase के, 100% AWS पर आधारित।
Initial release of TriNetra Super-App for Linux.

ul.li: AWS S3 Universal Download Hub Integration
6-in-1 Master AI with Mode C (Human-Brain Level)
